title: Organizational structure: Environment and Climate Change Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Organizational structure: Environment and Climate Change Canada
- Minister of Environment and Climate Change: The Honourable Julie Dabrusin Deputy Minister: Mollie Johnson Associate Deputy Minister: John Moffet Chief of Staff to the Deputy Minister Director General, Audit and Evaluation Executive Director and Senior General Counsel, Legal Services Assistant Deputy Minister, Strategic Policy and International Affairs Assistant Deputy Minister, Environmental Protection Assistant Deputy Minister, Canadian Wildlife Service Assistant Deputy Minister, Meteorological Service of Canada Assistant Deputy Minister, Science and Technology Assistant Deputy Minister, Corporate Services and Finance Chief Human Resources Management Officer, Human Resources Director General, Public Affairs and Communications Chief Enforcement Officer, Enforcement Assistant Deputy Minister, Programs, Operations and Regional Affairs Assistant Deputy Minister, Chief Service and Digital Officer, Digital Services
- Deputy Minister: Mollie Johnson
- Associate Deputy Minister: John Moffet
- Chief of Staff to the Deputy Minister
- Director General, Audit and Evaluation
- Executive Director and Senior General Counsel, Legal Services
- Assistant Deputy Minister, Strategic Policy and International Affairs
- Assistant Deputy Minister, Environmental Protection
- Assistant Deputy Minister, Canadian Wildlife Service
- Assistant Deputy Minister, Meteorological Service of Canada
- Assistant Deputy Minister, Science and Technology
- Assistant Deputy Minister, Corporate Services and Finance
- Chief Human Resources Management Officer, Human Resources
- Director General, Public Affairs and Communications
- Chief Enforcement Officer, Enforcement
- Assistant Deputy Minister, Programs, Operations and Regional Affairs
- Assistant Deputy Minister, Chief Service and Digital Officer, Digital Services
